_comment: Machine-readable version matrix for Computer. This is the single source of truth for all version pins. Consumed by bootstrap.sh and CI. Do not update versions without following the compatibility policy (docs/standards/compatibility-policy.md).

node.notes: LTS line; do not use Node 25 current

uv.notes: Python workspace and lock file manager

typescript.notes: Used in ops-web, family-web, SDKs, contract generation

react.notes: NEVER use 19.2.0 — critical RSC fix landed in 19.2.1; pin 19.2.4 or later

postgresql.notes: Jobs, assets, audit; no beta or RC in production

redis.notes: Ephemeral workflow state only; not truth store

mosquitto.notes: Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker; MQTT v5 support

home_assistant.notes: Integration and UI plane only; not system of record

ollama.notes: Primary model runtime; tool calling; Phase E

vllm.notes: Scale-up model runtime; structured outputs; Phase E+

ros2.notes: LTS distro; Nav2 must match this distro

nav2.notes: Must match ROS 2 kilted distro; do not use mismatched versions

px4.notes: 1.16 stable; do NOT upgrade to 1.17 until it exits alpha

gazebo.notes: Pin to ROS/Gazebo official compatibility matrix

micro_xrce_dds.notes: Known v2 client vs v3 agent incompatibility; test explicitly on upgrade

prometheus.notes: Consider 3.5 LTS if long freeze desired

docker_compose.notes: v2 compose plugin; avoid v1 standalone; pin plugin version in CI

semgrep.notes: SAST rules for auth boundary tests

not_in_v1.nats: Stay on MQTT + Postgres until concrete durability/topology need
not_in_v1.kubernetes: Optional for later; Docker Compose for local dev and early production
not_in_v1.crew_ai: Optional at advisory layer only; not the control plane
